risk_title: Project Implementation Halted Due to Extraordinary Political Situation
risk_summary: The project cannot be effectively implemented under the current extraordinary situation in Afghanistan, leading to cancellation of ARTF funds and suspension of implementation activities.
evidence_quote: This ISR documents the decision to cancel ARTF funds in the project is based on the consideration that the project cannot be effectively implemented under the current extraordinary situation in Afghanistan.

risk_summary: Political and Governance risk rating has remained consistently high throughout project implementation, indicating persistent governance fragility affecting project execution.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance [Risk Category Rating at Approval: High, Previous Rating: High, Current Rating: High]

risk_summary: Macroeconomic risk has escalated from Substantial to High, reflecting deteriorating economic conditions that threaten project viability and implementation capacity.
evidence_quote: Macroeconomic [Risk Category Rating at Approval: Substantial, Previous Rating: Substantial, Current Rating: High]

risk_summary: Institutional capacity for implementation and sustainability risk has escalated to High, indicating the implementing agencies (Ministry of Agriculture, Irrigation and Livestock, Ministry of Finance) lack capacity to execute project activities under current conditions.
evidence_quote: Institutional Capacity for Implementation and Sustainability [Risk Category Rating at Approval: Substantial, Previous Rating: Substantial, Current Rating: High]

risk_summary: Fiduciary risk has escalated from Substantial to High, indicating compromised ability to manage funds and ensure accountability in the extraordinary situation.
evidence_quote: Fiduciary [Risk Category Rating at Approval: Substantial, Previous Rating: Substantial, Current Rating: High]

risk_summary: Sector strategies and policies risk has escalated to High, suggesting the policy environment for agriculture and food supply is no longer conducive to project implementation.
evidence_quote: Sector Strategies and Policies [Risk Category Rating at Approval: Moderate, Previous Rating: Moderate, Current Rating: High]

risk_summary: Technical design risk has escalated to High, indicating the project's technical approach is no longer feasible under current extraordinary circumstances.
evidence_quote: Technical Design of Project or Program [Risk Category Rating at Approval: Moderate, Previous Rating: Moderate, Current Rating: High]

risk_summary: Stakeholder risk has escalated to High, suggesting tensions or inability to engage with government and development actors in the current political environment.
evidence_quote: Stakeholders [Risk Category Rating at Approval: Moderate, Previous Rating: Moderate, Current Rating: High]
